'''鈭歞-f-dh''' ('''kadafadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbonk|headbonk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbonk|headbonk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-f-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kadafadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidafadh|thidafadh]] || [[word:jidafadh|jidafadh]] || [[word:shidafadh|shidafadh]] || [[word:kidafadh|kidafadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudafadh|thuthudafadh]] || [[word:jujudafadh|jujudafadh]] || [[word:shushudafadh|shushudafadh]] || [[word:kukudafadh|kukudafadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudafadh|thudafadh]] || [[word:judafadh|judafadh]] || [[word:shudafadh|shudafadh]] || [[word:kudafadh|kudafadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudafadh|thudafadh]] || [[word:judafadh|judafadh]] || [[word:shudafadh|shudafadh]] || [[word:kudafadh|kudafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedafadh|thedafadh]] || [[word:jedafadh|jedafadh]] || [[word:shedafadh|shedafadh]] || [[word:kedafadh|kedafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodafadh|thothodafadh]] || [[word:jojodafadh|jojodafadh]] || [[word:shoshodafadh|shoshodafadh]] || [[word:kokodafadh|kokodafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodafadh|thodafadh]] || [[word:jodafadh|jodafadh]] || [[word:shodafadh|shodafadh]] || [[word:kodafadh|kodafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodafadh|thodafadh]] || [[word:jodafadh|jodafadh]] || [[word:shodafadh|shodafadh]] || [[word:kodafadh|kodafadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]] || [[word:dafadh|dafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dafadh|th忙dafadh]] || [[word:j忙dafadh|j忙dafadh]] || [[word:sh忙dafadh|sh忙dafadh]] || [[word:k忙dafadh|k忙dafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadafadh|thathadafadh]] || [[word:jajadafadh|jajadafadh]] || [[word:shashadafadh|shashadafadh]] || [[word:kakadafadh|kakadafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadafadh|thadafadh]] || [[word:jadafadh|jadafadh]] || [[word:shadafadh|shadafadh]] || [[word:kadafadh|kadafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadafadh|thadafadh]] || [[word:jadafadh|jadafadh]] || [[word:shadafadh|shadafadh]] || [[word:kadafadh|kadafadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadafadh|shadafadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadafadh|goshadafadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadafadh|gokishadafadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadafadhn眉|shadafadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkn眉|goshadafadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafadhn眉|gokishadafadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadafadhsh毛|shadafadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadafadhnksh毛|goshadafadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadafadhsh毛|gokishadafadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafadhro|shadafadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkro|goshadafadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafadhro|gokishadafadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafadhmu|shadafadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkmu|goshadafadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafadhmu|gokishadafadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadafadhsher|shadafadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadafadhnksher|goshadafadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadafadhsher|gokishadafadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadafadhng|shadafadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkng|goshadafadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadafadhng|gokishadafadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadafadhya|shadafadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkya|goshadafadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadafadhya|gokishadafadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadafadhyam|shadafadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkyam|goshadafadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadafadhyam|gokishadafadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadafadhn眉sh毛|shadafadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkn眉sh毛|goshadafadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadafadhn眉sh毛|gokishadafadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafadhn眉ro|shadafadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkn眉ro|goshadafadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafadhn眉ro|gokishadafadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafadhn眉mu|shadafadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkn眉mu|goshadafadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafadhn眉mu|gokishadafadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadafadhsh毛n眉|shadafadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadafadhnksh毛n眉|goshadafadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafadhsh毛n眉|gokishadafadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafadhsh毛ro|shadafadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafadhnksh毛ro|goshadafadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafadhsh毛ro|gokishadafadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafadhsh毛mu|shadafadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafadhnksh毛mu|goshadafadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafadhsh毛mu|gokishadafadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadafadhron眉|shadafadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkron眉|goshadafadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafadhron眉|gokishadafadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadafadhrosh毛|shadafadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkrosh毛|goshadafadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadafadhrosh毛|gokishadafadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadafadhromu|shadafadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkromu|goshadafadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadafadhromu|gokishadafadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadafadhmun眉|shadafadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkmun眉|goshadafadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadafadhmun眉|gokishadafadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadafadhmush毛|shadafadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkmush毛|goshadafadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadafadhmush毛|gokishadafadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadafadhmuro|shadafadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadafadhnkmuro|goshadafadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadafadhmuro|gokishadafadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
